---
title: "Geography of Odisha"
subtitle: "Detailed study of the physical and socio-cultural geography of the state of Odisha."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include geography-of-odisha/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Geography of Odisha** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include geography-of-odisha/01-physiography-and-climate.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-odisha/02-demography-and-tribes.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-odisha/03-economy-and-industries.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-odisha/04-disaster-management-odisha.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include geography-of-odisha/05-quick-reference.md >}}

---
